title: John Stankevitch
description: Rugby league professional coach and former player
extract: John Stankevitch (born 6 November 1979 in Whiston, Merseyside, England) is an English former professional rugby league footballer who played in the 2000s, and coached in the 2000s and 2010s. Stankevitch played for St. Helens and the Widnes in the Super League as a second-row and as a prop.
